questionHtml:
Hummingbirds eat flower nectar and small insects. To which nutritional group do they belong?

A. Autotrophs

B. Consumers

C. Detritivores

D. Saprotrophs

meta.title: Hummingbirds eat flower nectar and small insects. To which nutritional group do they belong? A. Autotrophs B. Consumers C. Detritivores D. Saprotrophs
